items.summary: ENGLAND ace Jarell Quansah limped off injured against Panama in yet another major World Cup blow for manager Thomas Tuchel. items.title: Scotland's elimination from World Cup confirmed
items.summary: Scotland are out of the 2026 World Cup as they are unable to finish the group stage as one of the eight best third-placed teams.

items.summary: SCOTLAND are officially OUT of the World Cup. items.title: Ireland take shock win but West Indies still progress to semi-finals
items.summary: Ireland secured their first win at a Women's T20 World Cup as they beat semi-final hopefuls West Indies by six wickets with 11 balls to spare in Bristol.

items.title: Kane breaks England World Cup goals record to double lead against Panama
items.summary: Harry Kane scores the 11th World Cup goal of his career to overtake Gary Lineker as England's all-time top scorer in the competition, as England take a 2-0 lead against Panama in their final Group L game.

items.title: Sources: Chelsea exploring deal for Granit Xhaka
items.summary: Chelsea are exploring a deal to sign Sunderland midfielder Granit Xhaka, sources have told ESPN.

items.summary: Scotland have been eliminated from the World Cup after failing to make it out of the group stage, with Ghana's defeat to Croatia finally sealing their fate.

items.title: Wyatt-Hodge masterclass helps England send New Zealand packing at T20 World Cup
items.summary: Danni Wyatt-Hodge put on a batting masterclass to help England remain unbeaten and send defending champions New Zealand home with a brilliant win at The Oval.

items.title: Dean hails '360 player' Wyatt-Hodge as imperious England remain unbeaten
